title: pilosella angustifolia subsp. crestana
intro: Pilosella angustifolia subsp. crestana, also known as Crested Oxeye Daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella angustifolia subsp. crestana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
